updates.tweet_text: Profitable trading is boring trading. Its 95% sitting on hands, followed by trading the same setup, managed the same way, with tight risk management, proper size, and doing this same routine year after year. If its exciting, your likely gambling, not trading
updates.notes: Pure motivational/philosophical commentary. No price levels mentioned, no actionable setups, no market structure referenced.

updates.tweet_text: @pathus21 You can't get rid of it, there's still tension with every trade but the process itself should be boring and repetitive
updates.notes: Reply tweet about trading psychology/process; no prices mentioned at all.

updates.tweet_text:
Big start to week in #ES_F. The last week has been all about 7421. Per Saturday post and Friday newsletter, plan was 7368 had to hold (held exact), then 7421 reclaims trigger long. We triggered long 6:05PM & 7472 target hit

Plan: Ride runner. 7492, 7502, 7511 next. 21=support https://t.co/ykj1DPsF2z
updates.notes: 7502 named as 'next' target alongside morning-plan levels 7492/7511; it is not in the published morning plan and is explicitly listed as a bull target/resistance to watch.

updates.notes: 7492 and 7530 are both in the morning plan; this is a reaffirmation of existing levels, not new actionable prices.

updates.tweet_text:
All the action happened at Friday's close/Sunday open and now we grind. This week's plan was #ES_F had to hold 7368. It held. 7421 reclaims then trigger up. We triggered 6pm. 7472 was target, hit.

7492, 7502, 7511, then 7530 is next. 7421 remains support. 7439 micro above https://t.co/AGCkfvoCld
updates.notes: 7492/7511/7530 are morning-plan levels; 7439 and 7502 appear in context as directional list references/observations, no explicit naming language qualifying them as new actionable levels.

updates.tweet_text: @coleridge8264 It was around 32-33. This is what you want to see though. Its those slow, grinding recoveries that felt especially around the 5 point non -acceptance protocol mark. The more momentum the better
